calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court on Labor Commission Appeal

Appearances:
ARLO GARCIA URIARTE, Esq., Law Offices of Vaughan de Kirby, A.P.C., (415) 221-2800, on behalf of plaintiff Maria Garcia
PATRICIA A. MURPHY, Esq., Otis Canli & Duckworth LLP, (415) 362-4442 x35, on behalf of defendant/respondent Liz Palacios Designs

Parties reached a settlement after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Plaintiff Maria Garcia agreed to final release of all statutory releases. CC 1542 waiver. Defendant to draft settlement agreement. Payment upon signing the agreement. Defendant/Respondent Liz Palacios Designs, Ltd. to pay plaintiff/appellant Maria Garcia the sum of $5,500.00 less standard deductions. All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott A. Myles; Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353 (206)
